raw_consumer_statement:
Regarding CFBP XXXX XXXX : XXXX I am re-opening a complaint here and providing the additional information requested as the reference above has already been closed out and there was no way to respond to it. 

I called in to Amex the number on the back of my card to provide additional information as instructed per the response AMEX sent me dated XX/XX/2024. They were unable to get me to the correct department to provide the information requested in XXXX XXXX XXXX : XXXX. The Customer Care representative gave me a ton of hardship even after explaining to him that I have additional information I would like to submit as instructed by your team. Although he could not open the letter, he did have access to notes but still refused to help. This morning has been extremely frustrating for me when reaching out to AMEX on this matter. 

This is why I am attaching this additional information for your review here and hope someone at AMEX in the correct department or A. Young, can reach out to me about this matter.
